question: In amino acid metabolism, what is the primary role of transamination reactions?
options: Synthesizing essential amino acids from scratch
Transferring an amino group from an amino acid to a keto acid
Oxidatively removing the amino group as ammonia
Converting amino acids into fatty acids
explanation: Transamination reactions, catalyzed by aminotransferases, transfer amino groups between amino acids and alpha-keto acids, redistributing nitrogen among amino acid pools.
